description_long: This is a robust, medieval-style war hammer with a heavy, rectangular metal head featuring a pointed spike on one side and a flat striking face on the other. The head is adorned with geometric patterns and reinforced edges, giving it a fortified appearance. The handle is cylindrical, made of wood, and wrapped with a textured grip at the lower end for secure handling. The transition between the head and handle is reinforced with metal bands, suggesting durability and strength. The overall design is utilitarian yet imposing, suitable for both display and practical use. The color palette consists of dark metallic tones for the head and muted brown and green hues for the handle.
description: A heavy, medieval-style war hammer with a spiked and flat metal head, wooden handle, and reinforced grip. The design is robust, with geometric patterns and a dark, utilitarian color scheme.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the side, showing the flat striking face, pointed spike, and detailed geometric patterns on the head.
description_view_1: A front view highlighting the pointed spike and the narrow profile of the hammer head, with the handle centered below.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the flat striking face and the reinforced metal bands, with the handle's grip clearly visible.
description_view_3: A rear view focusing on the back of the hammer head, showing the symmetry and the full length of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with a textured leather grip at the lower end, round cross-section, and reinforced with metal bands.
attribute_blade_design: Rectangular metal head with one flat striking face and one pointed spike, decorated with geometric patterns and reinforced edges.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and banded mounting with visible metal reinforcements securing the head to the handle.
